_notes: Pixel coordinates (x, y) from top-left of 1920x1080 full-resolution frame. Derived from Hough line detection on frame 599 (t=10s) and visual verification. near_kitchen_line = NVZ line for the left-side player; far_kitchen_line = NVZ line for the right-side player. Both lines run at y~469, spanning left and right halves of the frame respectively (net is at x~960). Use scripts/annotate_reference.py to refine these coordinates if the overlay does not align with the painted line.
